title: CDC Mortality Trend Analyzer
text:
Problem
Public health students need a fast, trustworthy way to explore U.S. mortality trends by cause, place, and time without hunting through static reports.

title: CDC Mortality Trend Analyzer
text:
Product Overview
Interactive Shiny app that:

Pulls live CDC NCHS data on demand
Visualizes trends over time
Shows state-level geography
Generates a concise, plain-language summary using LLM

title: CDC Mortality Trend Analyzer
text:
Live Demo
We will demo the app live in class (select cause, state, and years to explore trends).
App link:
laurenterr.shinyapps.io/cdc_analyzer

title: CDC Mortality Trend Analyzer
text:
Design Decisions and Trade-Offs

Live CDC API calls keep results current by fetching data at runtime
A clean, tabbed layout (trends, map, AI summary) keeps the flow fast but limits deep customization
The AI summary improves accessibility, but it’s generated by a button click rather than a custom user prompt

title: CDC Mortality Trend Analyzer
text:
If We Had More Time

Link in additional CDC datasets to add context (e.g., demographics or comorbidities)
Include sources that go beyond 2017

title: CDC Mortality Trend Analyzer
text:
Team
If presenting with a partner, we will both speak during the demo and Q&A.
